message:
test(fcp-e2e): add/fix E2E compliance tests for 4 connectors

Add or update E2E compliance tests for google-calendar, llm-router,
mcp-bridge, and webhook-receiver connectors. Each test file exercises
default deny behavior, happy path with valid capability tokens, and
manifest network guard allow/deny validation.

Fix llm-router network guard test to only check operations that have
explicit network_constraints sections (route and list_providers), not
all 5 operations.

All 12 tests pass, clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
